items.headline: TDIH: LeBron James Buzzer-Beater vs. Chicago Bulls during the ECSF in 2015
items.description: On May 10, 2015, LeBron James knocked down the game-winning jumper at the buzzer to lift the Cavaliers over the Bulls!

items.headline: Chasing History: Knicks Keep Rolling
items.description: The 76ers took it to the Knicks from the opening tip but NY regrouped and pulled away to take a 3-0 series lead

items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 131, Lakers 108
items.description: Ajay Mitchells career night propelled the Thunder to a 3-0 series lead with a 131-108 win over the Lakers.

items.headline: Chasing History: A Wemby Takeover
items.description: Victor Wembanyama turns in a dominant 39-PTS, 15-REB and 5-BLK performance in Game 3, propelling the Spurs to a 2-1 series lead.
